raw: Each pass allows two adults and up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount. Pass will need to be presented to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant and the Center's greeter even if you already have reservations.

source_phrases.max_adults: Each pass allows two adults and up to four children
source_phrases.max_children: up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center
source_phrases.max_people: two adults and up to four children
